name: AA_SIPARIS_MALIYET_RAPORU
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_SIPARIS_MALIYET_RAPORU] AS 
SELECT DISTINCT PROJE, OZEL_KOD, 
CAST(SUM(TUTAR) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS SIPARIS_TUTARI, 
CAST(SUM(SARF_EDILEN_TUTAR) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MALIYET_TUTARI
 FROM (


SELECT * ,

ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_RECETE_LISTESI WHERE MAMUL_KODU=MALZEME_KODU),0) AS RECETE_MIKTARI

,ISNULL(
ISNULL(
(sELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=PROJE AND STOK_KODU IN (SELECT STOK_KODU FROM AA_RECETE_LISTESI WHERE MAMUL_KODU=MALZEME_KODU)) ,
(sELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=PROJE AND STOK_KODU=MALZEME_KODU)
),0)AS SARF_EDILEN_MIKTAR
,ISNULL(
ISNULL(
(sELECT SUM(TUTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=PROJE AND STOK_KODU IN (SELECT STOK_KODU FROM AA_RECETE_LISTESI WHERE MAMUL_KODU=MALZEME_KODU)) ,
(sELECT SUM(TUTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=PROJE AND STOK_KODU=MALZEME_KODU)
),0)AS SARF_EDILEN_TUTAR


FROM (
SELECT MLZ.LOGICALREF MLZID,
FIS.DATE_ AS TARIH,
FIS.FICHENO AS FISNO,
(SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=FIS.PROJECTREF) AS PROJE,
MLZ.CODE AS MALZEME_KODU,
MLZ.NAME AS MALZEME_ADI,
--CASE WHEN MLZ.SPECODE5='ANAMLZ' THEN 'STANDART' 
--WHEN MLZ.CYPHCODE='ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' 
--ELSE 'BOŞ' END AS OZEL_KOD,
CASE WHEN MLZ.LOGICALREF IN (SELECT STCREF FROM LG_001_STCOMPLN WHERE STCREF=MLZ.LOGICALREF) THEN 'OPSİYONEL' WHEN MLZ.CYPHCODE='ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' ELSE 'STANDART' END AS OZEL_KOD,
SAT.AMOUNT AS SIPARIS_MIKTARI,
SAT.LINENET AS TUTAR

FROM LG_001_01_ORFLINE SAT

INNER JOIN LG_001_01_ORFICHE FIS ON SAT.ORDFICHEREF=FIS.LOGICALREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_ITEMS MLZ ON MLZ.LOGICALREF=SAT.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD CAR ON CAR.LOGICALREF=SAT.CLIENTREF

WHERE SAT.TRCODE=1 

) AS RAPOR 

) AS RAPOR_2 
--WHERE PROJE='RV04' 


GROUP BY  PROJE, OZEL_KOD
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
(SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=AAA.PROJECTREF) AS PROJE,'ÖTV' AS OZEL_KOD,
0 AS SIPARIS_TUTARI,
LINENET AS MALIYET_TUTARI 
FROM LG_001_01_STLINE AAA WHERE 
TRCODE=12 AND STOCKREF IN (sELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_001_ITEMS WHERE SPECODE5='ÖTV') 
--AND (SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=AAA.PROJECTREF)='RV04'
